description: App-owned workflow.research prompt rendered JSON output.

tests.description: [smoke] workflow-step prompt passes app paths and final-only contract

assert.value: (() => { const trimmed = output.trim(); if (!trimmed.startsWith('{') || !trimmed.endsWith('}')) return false; const data = JSON.parse(trimmed); const forbidden = new Set(['dimensions_selected', 'research_plan', 'research_lens', 'dimension_scores', 'selected_dimensions', 'topic_relevance', 'dimensions_evaluated']); const walk = (value) => { if (Array.isArray(value)) return value.every(walk); if (value && typeof value === 'object') return Object.entries(value).every(([key, child]) => !forbidden.has(key) && walk(child)); return true; }; return data.status === 'research_complete' && !('dimensions_selected' in data) && Number.isInteger(data.question_count) && data.research_output && data.research_output.version === '1' && data.research_output.metadata && !('research_plan' in data.research_output.metadata) && Array.isArray(data.research_output.sections) && walk(data); })()
